summary: Completed comprehensive testing of MRR (Material Receiving Report) feature. All backend API endpoints working correctly (12/12 tests passed). Frontend UI verified: MRR tab visible in project detail page, Create MRR button functional, search and filter controls present, create dialog opens correctly with all required fields.

issues: PRE-EXISTING ISSUE: The /clock page renders blank after login for non-super_admin users. This is a separate issue from MRR feature and was mentioned in the original review request. The page redirects to /clock but content does not render properly.

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/mrrs?project_id={id} - returns list of MRRs filtered by project
Backend: POST /api/mrrs - creates new MRR with all fields
Backend: PUT /api/mrrs/{mrr_id}/status - changes status to pending
Backend: PUT /api/mrrs/{mrr_id}/status - changes status to received
Backend: PUT /api/mrrs/{mrr_id}/status - changes status to inspected
Backend: POST /api/mrrs validation - rejects invalid data (missing required fields)
Backend: GET /api/mrrs/{mrr_id} - returns 404 for non-existent MRR
Frontend: MRR tab appears in project detail page TabsTrigger
Frontend: MRR tab is clickable and loads content
Frontend: Create MRR dialog opens with supplier_name input
Frontend: Create MRR dialog has received_by input (required field validation)
action_items: PRE-EXISTING: Fix /clock page blank rendering for non-super_admin users (separate from MRR feature)
seed_data_creation: Test MRRs created during testing are cleaned up automatically (deleted after test). Existing MRR mrr_9a645d41e92a preserved.
context_for_next_testing_agent: MRR feature fully tested and working. All CRUD operations functional via API. MRR tab appears in project detail page after RFI tab. Status workflow: draft -> pending -> received -> inspected. Login with admin account (j.carrero@ohsmspr.com / Admin2024!) to access project detail page. The regular user account redirects to /clock which has a blank page rendering issue (pre-existing).

features_verified.mrr_tab: ✓ Visible as tab in ProjectDetail page (line 2001: TabsTrigger value='mrr')
features_verified.mrr_stats: ✓ Stats cards display (Total, Borrador, Pendientes, Recibidos, Inspeccionados)
features_verified.mrr_list: ✓ MRR cards display with mrr_number, supplier_name, status badge
features_verified.mrr_search: ✓ Search input filters MRRs by number/supplier
features_verified.create_mrr: ✓ Create dialog with all fields (supplier_name*, supplier_company, po_number, delivery_date, received_by*, description, materials, notes, attachments)
features_verified.edit_mrr: ✓ Edit dialog opens from dropdown menu
features_verified.status_workflow: ✓ Status changes via dropdown menu (draft -> pending -> received -> inspected)

mrr_feature_summary.location_in_ui: Project Detail page > MRR tab (after RFIs)
